title: clerodendrum peregrinum
intro: Clerodendrum peregrinum, also known as the tropical glorybower, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, characterized by its clusters of small, white, and purple flowers and distinctive star-shaped calyx. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Clerodendrum peregrinum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Clerodendrum peregrinum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
